The '''''Ambassador''-class shuttle''', also known as the '''Ambassador-class luxury shuttle'''<ref name="STRONGHOLD">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref> and '''Luxury Shuttle 001''', was a [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] shuttle model.

==Characteristics==
Sleek with port and starboard wings, ''Ambassador''-class shuttles were built to spoil those with power, and often included a huge meeting and recreational chamber, fully stocked galley, elegant dining facilities, and roomy deluxe cabins.<ref name="DT" />

Fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] carried a crew of two (consisting of a pilot and a gunner), ten passengers, and 100 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo.<ref name="DT" /> For defense, it mounted two forward fire-linked double [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. It sported a reasonably fast [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and was capable enough to outrun a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and outmaneuver [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] with tight barrel rolls, sharp dives, and other evasive maneuvers.<ref name="DT" />

==History==
[[Tereb Ab'Lon]] used an ''Ambassador''-class to escape from the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class]] Star Destroyer ''[[Temerit]]'' above [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]].<ref name="DT" /> Under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], countless ''Ambassador''-class shuttles were made at the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Sarrano Yards]], a small ground-based shipbuilding facility; after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the yards went on to produce [[Cutlass-9 patrol fighter]]s and other [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].<ref name="STRONGHOLD" />
